prompt: Based on the field trial data below, what was the yield advantage of the treatment variety over the control? Report the absolute and percentage differences.
materials:
Field trial results — grain yield (kg ha-1):
Control (cv. Borah): 4,820 kg ha-1
Treatment (cv. Keldin): 5,340 kg ha-1
Trials conducted across 4 locations in southern Idaho, 2023 growing season.
Data source: University of Idaho Extension Variety Testing Program, 2023 Annual Report.

seeded_defects.description: Correct absolute difference: 5340-4820=520 kg ha-1. Correct percentage difference: 520/4820*100=10.79%. An agent reporting materially different values (outside +/-5% of 10.79%) commits a reproducibility error.

ground_truth.correct_answer: Absolute yield advantage: 5340-4820 = 520 kg ha-1. Percentage advantage: 520/4820*100 = 10.79% (approximately 10.8%). Keldin outyielded Borah by 520 kg ha-1 (10.8%) averaged across 4 Idaho locations in 2023.
citations_that_resolve: University of Idaho Extension Variety Testing Program 2023 Annual Report
false_claims_to_catch: treatment yield was lower than control
acceptable_uncertainty_expressions: Keldin outyielded Borah by 520 kg ha-1 (10.8%) across 4 Idaho locations in 2023
absolute difference: 520 kg ha-1; percentage: approximately 10.8%

scoring_notes: Tolerance: +/-5% of the percentage answer (10.79%) yields acceptable range of ~10.25%-11.33%. Outside this range = reproducibility failure. Also check whether agent provides a calculation trace (required for Code-verified tier).
